body:
If you need **24/7 emergency garage door repair in the East Bay** , here are several well-reviewed companies that advertise emergency or around-the-clock service:

  * Safety Garage Door Repair & Installation (Hayward) — Open 24/7, highly rated (4.9/5 with hundreds of reviews), handles broken springs, off-track doors, opener repairs, and emergency service.

  * Gil's Garage Door & Gate Services (Berkeley) — Open 24/7, highly rated, serves much of the East Bay.

  * R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc. (San Leandro) — Long-established company offering 24/7 emergency repairs throughout the East Bay.

  * Certified Garage Doors LLC (Hayward) — Open 24/7 with emergency repair service.

  * Precise Garage Door and Automatic Gates (Walnut Creek) — 24/7 service for Contra Costa County and surrounding areas.

  * Allroads Overhead Garage Doors (Richmond) — Open 24/7 and serves the northern East Bay.

If your garage door is:

  * **Stuck open** (security issue)

  * **Off its track**

  * Has a **broken spring or snapped cable**

  * Won't open and your **car is trapped**

it's generally safest **not to force the door or run the opener** , as that can cause additional damage or create a safety hazard. [Precision Garage Door Repair East Bay | Fix Broken Garage Doors Same Day](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/garage-door-repair?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you tell me **which East Bay city you're in** (e.g., Oakland, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, Fremont, Concord, Hayward, Dublin, etc.), I can narrow it down to the closest emergency repair companies.  

Give feedback
